kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=Serverest, url=https://serverest.dev, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '96', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Rabelos", "email": "lsutton@example.org", "password": "1234", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://serverest.dev/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '52', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "lsutton@example.org", "password": "1234"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Update Session
kw.doc: Updates HTTP Session Headers and Cookies.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://serverest.dev/produtos path_url=/produtos headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJlbWFpbCI6ImxzdXR0b25AZXhhbXBsZS5vcmciLCJwYXNzd29yZCI6IjEyMzQiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzE5NzAwMzYsImV4cCI6MTc3MTk3MDYzNn0.JzlCz67yHXbzTIDCjP3Jmse2VBAAs-GiStfR4HMcABk', 'Content-Length': '81', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "produto_465", "preco": "27", "descricao": "MOUSE", "quantidade": "100"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://serverest.dev/carrinhos path_url=/carrinhos headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJlbWFpbCI6ImxzdXR0b25AZXhhbXBsZS5vcmciLCJwYXNzd29yZCI6IjEyMzQiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzE5NzAwMzYsImV4cCI6MTc3MTk3MDYzNn0.JzlCz67yHXbzTIDCjP3Jmse2VBAAs-GiStfR4HMcABk', 'Content-Length': '70', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"produtos": [{"idProduto": "IYIZ9awGavMWaqeO", "quantidade": "100"}]}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
